title: Better Hypixel Experience
description: This modpack is designed to improve the overall Hypixel and general multiplayer server experience. It focuses on performance improvements and client-side optimizations, including enhancements to chat functionality and other quality-of-life features.
body:
# Server-Focused Fabric Modpack

## Overview

This Fabric modpack is designed specifically for **multiplayer and server-based gameplay**, with a strong focus on **performance, stability, and reliability**.
Its main goal is to provide a smooth and comfortable Minecraft experience on public servers such as Hypixel, while remaining fully **client-side**, **vanilla-friendly**, and **server-compatible**.

Unlike general optimization modpacks that aim for maximum performance at all costs, this pack follows a more conservative and deliberate approach. Every included mod is carefully selected to improve the client experience **without altering gameplay mechanics, player behavior, or server interaction**. This makes the modpack well-suited for competitive and long-term multiplayer environments.

---

## Design Goals

* Improve overall client performance and responsiveness
* Enhance visual clarity and usability
* Add small, practical quality-of-life improvements
* Avoid intrusive or gameplay-changing features
* Remain compatible with common server rules and expectations

> The focus is not on adding more features, but on improving what already exists.

---

## What This Modpack Provides

* Lightweight performance optimizations for smoother gameplay
* UI and HUD improvements that improve readability and clarity
* Safer client-side enhancements suitable for multiplayer servers
* Optional visual features such as shaders and zoom
* Chat and interface improvements that remain subtle and non-intrusive

All changes are designed to feel **natural**, **clean**, and **close to vanilla**, while still noticeably improving the overall experience.

---

## Intended Usage

1. Multiplayer servers (primary focus)
2. Private worlds and singleplayer (fully supported)

While the modpack can be used anywhere, it is primarily optimized for **server gameplay**, which is why some aggressive or experimental optimizations are intentionally excluded.

---

## Included Mod Topics

* Performance and rendering optimizations
* Enchantment description improvements
* World protection and safety features
* Enhanced statistics and UI screens
* Information overlays (e.g. block and entity data)
* Chat readability and organization tools
* Optional shader and zoom functionality

The exact mod list may change over time as the pack evolves.

---

<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>

* Animated Mojang Logo
* AppleSkin
* Architectury API
* BadOptimizations
* Balm
* Better Ping Display
* Better Statistics Screen
* Chat Animation
* Chat Heads
* Chat Patches
* Cherished Worlds
* Clumps
* Continuity
* Controlling
* Debugify
* Default Options
* Detail Armor Bar
* Distant Horizons
* Durability Tooltip
* Dynamic FPS
* Entity Culling
* Essential
* Fabric API
* Fabric Language Kotlin
* FancyMenu
* Fast IP Ping
* FerriteCore
* ImmediatelyFast
* Iris Shaders
* Jade
* JEI
* Language Reload
* Lithium
* Melody
* Mod Menu
* No Chat Reports
* No Resource Pack Warnings
* Not Enough Crashes
* Ping Wheel
* Placeholder API
* Reese’s Sodium Options
* Searchables
* Skin Layers 3D
* Smooth Scroll
* Sodium
* Sodium Extra
* SuperMartijn642’s Config Lib
* TCD Commons
* YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)
* YOSBR
* Zoomify
  
> This list will be updated, not fix!

</details>

---

## Summary

This is a **lightweight, server-oriented Fabric modpack** that focuses on performance, usability, and stability without compromising compatibility or the vanilla feel. It is ideal for players who want a better multiplayer experience without unnecessary risks or intrusive features.
